commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=73da0d9fa34c39cd32fcd6a8eeffd7f449240545)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps Discord API success-body JSON parsing in DiscordApiError handling, adds a malformed-response unit test, and adds a standalone proof script.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +143. Total +150 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main reads a successful non-empty Discord API response and passes it directly to JSON.parse. I did not run tests in this read-only review, but the added unit test is a clear focused reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or human follow-up is needed because external-PR real behavior proof must be corrected from the contributor's setup before merge.

target.title: fix(discord): guard JSON.parse against malformed API response bodies
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/discord/src/api.ts:198` calls `JSON.parse(text)` on the raw Discord API response body without try/catch protection. If Discord returns a 200 with malformed JSON, the unhandled `SyntaxError` propagates up through `retryAsync` and crashes the calling code path.

## Changes

- `extensions/discord/src/api.ts`: wrap `JSON.parse(text)` in try/catch; throw `DiscordApiError("malformed JSON")` on parse failure
- `extensions/discord/src/api.test.ts`: test verifying malformed JSON → `DiscordApiError`
- `test/_proof_discord_json_guard.mts`: real-HTTP proof (4 PASS, 0 FAIL)

Label: bugfix | merge-risk: 🟢 minimal | AI-assisted

## Evidence

### Real HTTP proof (L2)

```
$ node --import tsx test/_proof_discord_json_guard.mts

[proof] malformed JSON server on :XXXXX
PASS  malformed JSON: raw JSON.parse throws SyntaxError :: threw=SyntaxError
PASS  guarded path: throws DiscordApiError :: type=DiscordApiError
PASS  guarded path: status is 0 :: status=0
PASS  guarded path: message is descriptive :: msg="Discord API /test returned malformed JSON"

[proof] 4 PASS, 0 FAIL
```

### Unit test

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/discord/src/api.test.ts

 ✓ throws DiscordApiError on malformed JSON success response body
 ... (all existing tests pass)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
```

### v2 fix

- Removed unused `catch (cause)` → `catch` (lint: no-unused-vars)
- Added real behavior proof script
